title: King's Edge step resource model
description: Resource demand is authored on the delivery step that needs it. The app derives the deliverable-level resource and investment profile by aggregating these step asks.

id.description: Optional stable ID. The app generates one from the step when omitted.

periodNeeded.description: When the resource is needed. Omit when it is the same as the parent step period.

owner.description: Person or team responsible for securing or supplying the resource.

decisionNeededBy.description: Latest useful point for a funding, prioritisation or capacity decision.

confidence.description: Confidence in the estimate or availability.

rationale.description: Why this resource is needed for the step.

riskIfMissing.description: Delivery consequence if the ask is not met.

existingCapacity.description: Existing people, expertise or operational capacity that must be aligned or protected for this step.

newInvestment.description: Additional cash or funded capacity required by this step.

enablingConditions.description: Non-cash conditions such as data access, governance agreement, roadmap priority or faculty participation.

existingCapacity.contribution: Support data access, specification and quality checks.
existingCapacity.riskIfMissing: The first evidence pack cannot be produced to the required standard.

newInvestment.rationale: Supports data preparation, visualisation development and early testing.
newInvestment.riskIfMissing: The first pack may not be ready for September testing.

enablingConditions.condition: Access to relevant graduate outcomes and programme context data
enablingConditions.riskIfMissing: The pack cannot provide a credible programme-level view.
